reason: The published JAR for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-data-redis:2.7.18 contains only META-INF files and no JVM class files; it is a dependency starter whose runtime classes are supplied by its dependencies.
replacement: Use class-bearing dependencies such as org.springframework.data:spring-data-redis:2.7.18, io.lettuce:lettuce-core:6.1.10.RELEASE, and org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure:2.7.18.
